name: Corporate Roundtable
tagline: Connecting our members to corporate Atlanta — opportunity, access, and professional growth.
overview: The Corporate Roundtable committee secures and coordinates all General Body Meeting locations, creating access to Atlanta's most prominent corporate spaces for E100 members. GBMs run the third Tuesday of each month from 6–9PM. Beyond venue logistics, CR creates executive access moments — panels, fireside chats, and leadership conversations — that give members direct exposure to the networks and knowledge needed to advance their careers.
